title: Training Example
description: ChatML format training example for JADE/Katie fine-tuning. Every example in the curated corpus must match this schema.

messages.content: You are a Kubernetes security engineer.
A pod in namespace 'payments' is running as root. How do I fix this?

Add securityContext to the pod spec:

```yaml
spec:
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 1000
  containers:
  - name: app
    securityContext:
      allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
      readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
      capabilities:
        drop: ["ALL"]
```

If the app writes to disk, add an emptyDir volume for /tmp.
